hypothesis: If a hybrid Transformer-Mamba encoder-decoder foundation model is pre-trained on multiple molecular representation modalities simultaneously using aligned multimodal objectives, then it will learn a unified latent space that enables accurate cross-modal molecular representation translation and superior property prediction across diverse chemical domains (small molecules, polymers, and electrolytes) compared to single-modality approaches, because joint training on complementary molecular notations captures complementary structural, chemical, and contextual information that no single representation alone encodes.
